description: Portable read-only persistent-session worker role for the Sachima Phase E-2 bounded real persistent-session execution slice. acpx_binary stays null in this committed config, so the Phase E-2 runner-provenance gate fails closed and this role is NOT runnable by construction. Before any real local/offline smoke an operator must supply a local overlay that pins runner.acpx_binary to a verified absolute local acpx 0.10.0 executable (optionally checked against an expected sha256). No npx/npm/pnpm/yarn/bunx/shell fallback is ever a runnable path. This role is local and offline only: read-only, no external messaging surface, no live or default-on behavior, no public network exposure, and no production configuration.

prompt.role_instruction: You are the Sachima persistent session worker. Operate read-only over the sanitized material referenced by the caller. Do not modify files, run commands, fetch resources, switch modes, or deliver to any external surface.
prompt.output_contract: Return plain text. When asked for a token, reply with exactly the requested token and nothing else.
